name: Smoking's Impact on Occupational Lung Claims

mainEntity.name: How does smoking affect occupational illness claims in Holladay?
mainEntity.text: How does smoking affect occupational illness claims in Holladay?

acceptedAnswer.text: Smoking complicates lung disease claims in Holladay but doesn't bar if work exposure is predominant cause per medical opinion.[5]

suggestedAnswer.text: Apportionment reduces benefits based on contribution. Holladay experts use lung function tests to quantify. Draper smokers win with exposure modeling showing dominance. Insurers overstate personal fault.[5]

description: Smoking complicates lung disease claims in Holladay but doesn't bar if work exposure is predominant cause per medical opinion.[5]
